name: context7
description: Up-to-date library documentation and code examples for any package

name: openviking
description: Context database for AI agents — tiered memory (L0/L1/L2), semantic retrieval, and document ingestion via filesystem paradigm (viking://)
setup_instructions:
OpenViking runs as a local Python process in an isolated venv (~/.openviking/venv).
Embeddings run via your local Jina server — no key needed.
Only a VLM API key is required for RAG answer generation.

Add to mcps/.env:
  OPENVIKING_VLM_API_KEY=your-api-key
  OPENVIKING_VLM_MODEL=claude-sonnet-4-6

VLM model examples (litellm format):
  Claude    -> claude-sonnet-4-6
  OpenAI    -> gpt-4o
  DeepSeek  -> deepseek/deepseek-chat
  Kimi      -> moonshot/kimi-k2.5

Then run: ./install.sh
